description:
You are a web administrator for the Department of Digital Humanities. Implement a 12-page hierarchical website structure in WordPress with "Publish" status for all pages using the following specifications:

Top-Level Pages:
- "About the Department" (Order: 1, Content: "Department of Digital Humanities")
- "Academic Programs" (Order: 2, Content: "undergraduate and graduate degree programs")
- "Research & Scholarship" (Order: 3, Content: "cutting-edge research")

Children of "About the Department":
- "Mission Statement" (Order: 1, Content: "advance the intersection of technology and humanistic inquiry")
- "Faculty Directory" (Order: 2, Content: "Dr. Sarah Chen" and "Dr. Marcus Rivera")
- "Contact Information" (Order: 3, Content: "dhinfo@university.edu" and "Room 412, Hawthorne Hall")

Children of "Academic Programs":
- "Undergraduate Studies" (Order: 1, Content: "Bachelor of Arts in Digital Humanities")
- "Graduate Studies" (Order: 2, Content: "Master of Arts" and "Doctor of Philosophy")
- "Course Catalog" (Order: 3, Content: "DH 101" and "DH 450")

Children of "Research & Scholarship":
- "Current Projects" (Order: 1, Content: "Digital Archive of Historical Newspapers")
- "Publications" (Order: 2, Content: "Journal of Digital Humanities")
- "Funding Opportunities" (Order: 3, Content: "National Endowment for the Humanities")
